description_en: These programs provide targeted financial support and advisory services to entrepreneurs from underrepresented communities in Canada and Quebec.

programs.description_en: Federal initiative providing grants and resources to women-owned businesses and organizations that support women entrepreneurs
Loan fund for women entrepreneurs based in Montreal
Federal program providing loans (up to $250,000) and training to Black business owners in Canada
Funding for Indigenous entrepreneurs and communities to start or expand a business
programs.target_group: First Nations, Métis, and Inuit entrepreneurs

programs.description_en: Quebec and Montreal offer targeted advisory support and micro-loans for immigrant and newcomer entrepreneurs through organizations like MIDI and Femmessor
